children.name: resume.md
children.content:
# Pravin — Full Stack Developer

## Summary
Passionate full-stack developer with expertise in Django, React, and cloud technologies.

## Experience
- **Senior Developer** — Built scalable web applications serving 100k+ users
- **Open Source Contributor** — Active contributor to Python/JS ecosystem

## Education
- B.Tech in Computer Science

children.name: cover-letter.txt
children.content:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the Full Stack Developer position.
With extensive experience in Django, React, and TypeScript, I bring a strong
foundation in building modern web applications.

Best regards,
Pravin

children.name: ecommerce-platform.md
children.content:
# E-Commerce Platform

A full-featured online store built with Django REST + React.

## Tech Stack
- Backend: Django, PostgreSQL, Redis
- Frontend: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS
- Infrastructure: Docker, AWS

## Features
- Product catalog with search & filters
- Shopping cart & checkout
- Payment integration (Stripe)
- Admin dashboard

children.name: ai-assistant.md
children.content:
# AI Assistant

An intelligent chatbot powered by LLMs.

## Tech Stack
- Python, FastAPI
- OpenAI API, LangChain
- React frontend

## Features
- Natural language understanding
- Context-aware conversations
- Plugin system for extensibility

children.name: web-os-portfolio.md
children.content:
# Web-OS Portfolio

A browser-based operating system that serves as a portfolio.

## Tech Stack
- React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS
- Canvas API (games)
- LocalStorage (persistence)

## Features
- Window manager with drag/resize
- Virtual file system
- Terminal emulator
- Built-in games

children.name: wallpapers-info.txt
children.content:
Default wallpapers for Web-OS.
Change wallpaper via Settings or right-click desktop > Personalize.

children.content:

version=1.0.0
theme=dark
locale=en-US
